mapper.select: SELECT * FROM warehouses WHERE id = #{id} AND is_delete = 0
SELECT * FROM warehouses WHERE is_delete = 0 ORDER BY id ASC

SELECT * FROM warehouses
is_delete = 0
AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM warehouses
is_delete = 0
AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO warehouses (name, code, address, contact, phone, status, created_at, updated_at, is_delete) VALUES (#{name}, #{code}, #{address}, #{contact}, #{phone}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW(), 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE warehouses SET name = #{name}, code = #{code}, address = #{address}, contact = #{contact}, phone = #{phone}, status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE warehouses SET is_delete = 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
